channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Injury-prone Rockies DH Kris Bryant heads to IL for 9th time since joining the team in 2022
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Colorado Rockies designated hitter Kris Bryant has landed on the 10-day injured list with a bad back, the latest in a series of health issues that have resulted in nine IL stints since 2022. The team said the move, retroactive to Sunday, is due to lumbar degenerative disk disease.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Sky reunite Hailey Van Lith with Angel Reese in WNBA Draft
item.description: Hailey Van Lith and Angel Reese are teammates once more, as the Chicago Sky took the former LSU Tigers guard 11th overall in the 2025 WNBA Draft.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Paige Bueckers is No. 1 pick in WNBA draft, going to the Dallas Wings
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Paige Bueckers is ready for her next chapter after a whirlwind week that started with her helping UConn win its 12th national championship and ended with her becoming the WNBA's No. 1 draft pick by the Dallas Wings. “I’m just extremely excited to be there.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: WNBA assembles task force to help combat online hate toward players and teams
item.description: WNBA Commissioner Cathy Engelbert announced shortly before the draft on Monday that the league has assembled a dedicated task force to help combat online hate and vitriol directed toward players and teams.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Aaron Judge salutes 'brave men and women' fighting for country after being named Team USA captain for WBC
item.description: Aaron Judge was named Team USA's captain for the 2026 World Baseball Classic, and during his press conference, he saluted the "brave men and women who have fought for our country.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Denver Nuggets boss Josh Kroenke says firings of coach and GM were months in the making
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Denver Nuggets boss Josh Kroenke said Monday that he twice balked at firing the winningest coach in franchise history and the general manager who connected the final pieces of the team's only championship puzzle before finally canning them last week with just three games left in the se
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ex-PGA Tour pro Steve Elkington rips CBS for call on Rory McIlroy's potential disaster putt
item.description: Ex-PGA Tour pro Steve Elkington was highly critical of Jim Nantz's call during Rory McIlroy's 18th hole putt that forced a playoff at The Masters.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Limping to finish line, San Jose Sharks recall three players from AHL
item.description: Danil Gushchin, Luca Cagnoni and Jimmy Schuldt brought up as San Jose Sharks face the Vancouver Canucks on Monday night
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Trump receives praise from WWE icon for ability to generate heat
item.description: WWE chief content officer Paul Levesque praised President Donald Trump's ability to generate heat and get "under people's skin" amid his rise to the White House.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: US-based Original Six Red Wings, Rangers, Bruins, Blackhawks eliminated from playoffs for 1st time
item.description: The Original Six teams based in the United States have a rich history, combining to hoist the Stanley Cup 27 times. And now, they share an unwanted distinction. Detroit, Boston, Chicago and the New York Rangers will all miss the playoffs in the same year for the first time in NHL history.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kyle Larson and Denny Hamlin renew rivalry at Bristol with their seventh 1-2 finish
item.description: A second consecutive victory at Bristol Motor Speedway was especially sweet for Kyle Larson, and one reason loomed large in his rearview mirror.
item.dc:creator: NATE RYAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Paige Bueckers expected to be top pick in WNBA Draft
item.description: The Dallas Wings have the No. 1 pick in the 2025 WNBA Draft, and Paige Bueckers is set to be the top selection.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kyren Lacy's father breaks silence on son's death
item.description: The father of former LSU star wide receiver Kyren Lacy broke his silence on his son's death on Sunday as authorities revealed more information on his death.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jazz close out season with 116-105 loss at Minnesota
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (ABC4 Sports) - The NBA season has mercifully come to an end for the Utah Jazz. The Jazz ended the worst season in franchise history with a 116-105 loss to the Minnesota Timberwolves, who were led by Anthony Edwards with 43 points.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Fantilli and Greaves are the latest contributors in keeping the Blue Jackets' playoff hopes going
item.description: The Columbus Blue Jackets' surprising season of exceeding expectations and contending for the playoffs is still going after beating the Eastern Conference-leading Washington Capitals twice this weekend.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Whyno, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Kyren Lacy led deputies on police chase before dying of 'self-inflicted gunshot wound,' officials say
item.description: Texas officials release details surrounding the death of former LSU Tigers star wide receiver Kyren Lacy on Sunday after he was pronounced dead Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: RSL loses to Nashville on late penalty kick, 2-1
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) - Sam Surridge scored on a penalty kick in the first minute of second-half stoppage time to rally Nashville SC to a 2-1 victory over Real Salt Lake on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Cubs have big night in 16-0 rout of Dodgers, handing LA the worst home shutout loss in franchise history
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers franchise has been around since 1884, going back to its days in Brooklyn. And no team had ever done to the Dodgers in front of their home crowd what the Cubs did at Dodger Stadium on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: MIKE DIGIOVANNA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Fruita and Palisade show off defensive skill in 2-1 Wildcats win
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — We had an absolute showdown between two worthy Southwestern League foes at Suplizio Field Friday. Fruita pitchers Gavin Cardoza (1.62 ERA Friday) and Noah Brackett (0 ERA Friday) shut down Palisade's offense after a first-inning run.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Phil Wertman Invitational: GJ's Bryce Flanagan dominates 800m and more
item.description: The sun scorched down on Stocker Stadium Friday for the Phil Wertman Invitational. But the heat did not stop many of the Western Slope's top athletes from showing off their speed, power and verticals.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: MTS ramps up Trolley service for Padres, Wave FC fans
item.description: ocal sports fans are in luck because the San Diego Metropolitan Transit System (MTS) is ramping up Trolley service this weekend.
item.dc:creator: Ed Lenderman, Fox 5

item.title: White Sox enter matchup with the Red Sox on losing streak
item.description: Boston Red Sox (7-7, third in the AL East) vs. Chicago White Sox (2-10, fifth in the AL Central) Chicago; Friday, 7:40 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Tampa Bay Rowdies dismiss head coach ahead of home opener
item.description: A spokesperson for the Tampa Bay Rowdies announced Friday that the club has relieved head coach Robbie Neilson of his duties.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utah HC thankful for tremendous fan support
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Although the team was officially eliminated from NHL playoff contention last night, that did not damper the mood before the Utah Hockey Club's final home game of this inaugural season Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU lands point guard Robert Wright III from Baylor
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It didn't take long for Kevin Young to find his new point guard. According to multiple reports, Baylor's Robert Wright III is transferring to BYU for his sophomore season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Cavaliers claim the No. 1 seed in the Eastern Conference with a 135-113 win over the Bulls
item.description: Darius Garland scored 28 points, Evan Mobley had 21 points, 11 rebounds and seven assists and the Cleveland Cavaliers clinched the top seed in the Eastern Conference with a 135-113 win over the Chicago Bulls on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Salt Lake Bees celebrate first home game at new Daybreak ballpark
item.description: The Bees will welcome the Reno Aces for a six-game homestand starting April 8, which will include giveaways, music, and activities for the whole family.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Egor Demin leaves BYU for NBA Draft
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU standout point guard Egor Demin has decided to leave BYU after one season and declare for the NBA Draft. Demin made the announcement at a press conference held at the school Tuesday morning.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Walter Clayton Jr.'s defensive stop gives Florida its 3rd national title with 65-63 win over Houston
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Florida’s Walter Clayton Jr. came up with the perfect going-away present for that spirit-crushing Houston defense that bullied, battered and bedeviled him all night. It was a defensive gem of his own. Right before the buzzer. For the win and the national title.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Retzlaff poised for another big year at BYU
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Last season, BYU quarterback Jake Retzlaff threw for almost 3,000 yards, 20 touchdowns, while rushing for over 400 yards and six TD's as the Cougars shocked everyone with an 11-2 season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
